headlines.title: Iran war splits older and younger conservatives - as pressure builds for Trump to find exit ramp
headlines.description: More than a thousand miles from Washington, the conflict was a dominant topic of conversation at CPAC.

headlines.title: Agent begged Epstein to have sex with model, emails show
headlines.description: Ramsey Elkholy introduced the financier to women as young as 18 in correspondence over almost a decade.

headlines.title: 'He would have been horrified' - error in drug warnings 'misled' families
headlines.description: Warnings for dopamine agonist drugs are to be reviewed after BBC identified an error in patient leaflets.

headlines.title: Tiger Woods released on bail after car crash
headlines.description: Tiger Woods, the 15-time golf major champion, is released on bail following his arrest on charges of driving under the influence following a car crash in Florida.

headlines.title: Trump and oil: Tracking the moves in five charts
headlines.description: Oil markets have been sensitive to Donald Trump's comments on the war. But are traders growing less responsive?

headlines.title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
headlines.description: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.

headlines.title: I escaped North Korea with my mum. Now I'm terrified she might be sent back
headlines.description: Geumseong survived a dangerous journey to South Korea, but his mother is stuck in a Chinese prison and may be forcibly repatriated.

headlines.title: Tiramisu hot cross buns, doughnut eggs: Have Easter treats gone too far?
headlines.description: With the cost of living rising, shoppers give us their thoughts about the new versions of the Easter classics.

headlines.title: 'We're having a moment' - fear and denial in Silicon Valley over social media addiction trial
headlines.description: The landmark decision in an LA court may go beyond immediate impacts on defendants Meta and YouTube.

headlines.title: Are UK students at risk of more deadly meningitis outbreaks?
headlines.description: The worst seems to be over, but questions remain about why this happened and whether it could happen again.

headlines.title: Noah Wyle is back in A&E with new drama The Pitt: 'I hope people watch with empathy'

headlines.title: Video shows US missile likely used in deadly strike on Iranian town, experts say
headlines.description: The analysts identified a Precision Strike Missile (PrSM) in footage of the strike on the southern town of Lamerd.

headlines.title: 'Our home is gone': BBC speaks to displaced families in Lebanon
headlines.description: The BBC's Hugo Bachega speaks to families in Beirut as more than a million people have been displaced in Lebanon.

headlines.title: Why mountainous coastline gives Iran such control over Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: Paul Adams explains why it is so dangerous to navigate the strait, one of the world's busiest oil shipping channels.

headlines.title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
headlines.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

headlines.title: Sanctioned oil tanker enters UK waters day after government crackdown threat
headlines.description: Ministers said earlier this week that sanctioned vessels can now be boarded by UK armed forces.

headlines.title: Where have weekend jobs for teenagers gone?

headlines.title: When and why do the clocks go forward?

headlines.description: The planned vote is unlikely to end the funding impasse as long security lines at US airports continue.
